request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Given a prediction-market contract and a single regulatory news record, decide if this record is relevant to whether the contract resolves YES or NO. Score relevance 0-10 (0 = off-topic, 10 = directly determinative). Return JSON matching the schema. one_line_why should be ≤160 chars and explain how this record moves resolution probability.
request.user:
Contract title: Will the Federal Reserve Cut rates by 25bps at their January 2028 meeting?
Resolution criteria: If the Federal Reserve does a Cut of 25bps on January 26, 2028, then the market resolves to Yes.
Conditions:
  A: FOMC 25 bps cut on Jan 26, 2028 — On Jan 26, 2028, the FOMC announces an exact 25 bp reduction in the federal funds rate target range (both bounds down 0.25 pp vs prior), per official Federal Reserve release.
Settlement entities: ['Federal Open Market Committee', 'Federal Reserve System', 'Federal Reserve Board of Governors', 'Jerome Powell', 'Department of the Treasury', 'Bureau of Labor Statistics']

Record title: Treasury Sanctions Cambodian Senator Kok An and Scam Center Network Defrauding Americans
Record date: 2026-04-23
Record regulator: U.S. Department of the Treasury, Office of Foreign Assets Control — Office of Foreign Assets Control
Record topic: United States Department of the Treasury
Record entities: ['Aik Paung', 'Anco Brothers Co Ltd', 'Aurum Co Ltd', 'Bolai', 'Brilliancy Sihanoukville Investment and Development Co Ltd', 'Crown Resorts', 'Daren Li', 'Department of Justice', 'Department of State', 'Federal Bureau of Investigation', 'Financial Crimes Enforcement Network', 'Heng Feng Cambodia Bank plc', 'Heng Feng Group Co Ltd', 'Huan Hai Bo Lai International Investment Co Ltd', 'K99 Culture and Media Co Ltd', 'K99 Group', 'Khmer Electrical Power Co Ltd', 'Kok An', 'Luo Hong', 'Mekong Potable Water Construction Import Export Co Ltd', 'Nan Tian International Hotel Co Ltd', 'Office of Foreign Assets Control', 'Prince Group', 'Rithy Raksmei', 'Sai Aung Linn', 'Secret Service', 'SSDD Construction Material Co Ltd', 'Tai Chang scam compound', 'U.S. Attorney’s Office for the District of Columbia', 'U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Eastern District of Virginia', 'U.S. Attorney’s Office, Central District of California', 'U.S. Department of the Treasury', 'United Kingdom’s Foreign Commonwealth and Development Office', 'Xihu Resort Hotel Co Ltd', 'Xing Tian Di Co Ltd', 'Xiong Wei Investment Co Ltd', 'Xiong Wei Real Estate Co Ltd']

response.one_line_why: OFAC sanctions of Cambodian actors are unrelated to US monetary policy or the FOMC’s Jan 26, 2028 rate decision, so no bearing on a 25bp cut.
